Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The Initialize method detects the SDL video driver and stores the corresponding platform-specific binding structure.

Note.Paragraph: On macOS, WindowInfoSDL3::Initialize must be called from a module compiled as Objective-C++, because SDL exposes the Cocoa window object and the helper must access its content view.
On Linux with both Xlib and XCB support compiled in, the SDL helper selects Xlib for the SDL x11 video driver because the Xlib branch is tested first.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: bool Initialize(cobalt::logging::ILogger* log, SDL_Window* sdlWindow, const V2UInt32& windowSize);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The logger used for unsupported-driver error messages.
The drawable window size in pixels.

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: true if a supported platform binding structure was created; otherwise false.
